Rice-specific. PAFT 100-1000 Hz sweep 550 Hz midpoint. 50% sheath blight reduction. Same protocol as Hou2009. Direct rice evidence. Yield formation pathway is rice-specific - cross-species yield proxies (wheat cotton) excluded from yield calibration as morphological yield mechanisms diverge too significantly across species.

Alfalfa 250 Hz 100 dB. +200% flavonoid vs control. Flavonoid biosynthesis pathway shared with rice - same CHS and F3H gene family. Cross-species discount 0.4. Concordant with Lorentzian low-freq tail.

Broccoli sprout 800 Hz 100 dB. +35% flavonoid. Flavonoid biosynthesis CHS/F3H gene family conserved with rice. Cross-species discount 0.4. 800 Hz concordant with Jeong2014 RWC peak - same frequency window supports stress resilience activation at this band.

Red radish sprout 1000 Hz 100 dB. +85% flavonoid. Cross-species discount 0.4. Gives numeric calibration point at 1 kHz for stress resilience window. Note: yield cross-species proxies excluded from yield KPI calibration - yield formation is morphologically species-specific unlike flavonoid biosynthesis which is pathway-conserved.

SOD CAT POD APX all significantly enhanced at 1 kHz 100 dB peak day 9. Antioxidant enzyme pathway fully conserved across all plant species unlike yield formation. Cross-species discount 0.35. Concordant direction with Kim2019 stress resilience window.
